name: Obsidian OmniSearch MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server integrating with Obsidian's OmniSearch plugin to provide semantic and full-text search across an Obsidian vault. Enables AI agents to search notes, find related content, and retrieve knowledge from Obsidian personal knowledge bases using OmniSearch's indexing capabilities.
use_cases: Searching an Obsidian vault for relevant notes from AI research and writing agents
Finding related content and backlinks in Obsidian knowledge bases via AI agents
Integrating personal Obsidian notes into AI-assisted research and writing workflows
Querying OmniSearch index for semantic search across PKM content
not_for: Users without Obsidian and OmniSearch plugin installed
Shared team knowledge bases (Obsidian is primarily personal PKM)
best_when: An Obsidian power user with the OmniSearch plugin installed wants AI agents to search and retrieve content from their personal knowledge base as context for writing, research, or question-answering.
avoid_when: You don't use Obsidian with the OmniSearch plugin. Requires both Obsidian running and OmniSearch plugin active.

auth.notes: No authentication — connects to local Obsidian OmniSearch plugin API (localhost). Obsidian must be running.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — requires Obsidian (free for personal use) with OmniSearch plugin (free)
pricing.notes: Obsidian is free for personal use. OmniSearch plugin is free. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits — local Obsidian API

known_agent_gotchas: Requires Obsidian app running with OmniSearch plugin active and API enabled — not always-on
OmniSearch API must be enabled in plugin settings (not default) — check plugin configuration
Search results depend on OmniSearch index freshness — newly added notes may not appear immediately
Local-only access — cannot search vault remotely unless Obsidian is accessible
agent_readiness.security_notes: Personal notes may contain sensitive information — local-only access limits exposure. No network exposure.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local access only. Personal vault may contain sensitive notes. No remote exposure.
